SemanticVersioningService.name: Semantic version
SemanticVersioningService.description: Versions the ontology with semantic versioning scheme (e.g. 3.5.1).

GeneralVersioningService.name: User defined version
GeneralVersioningService.description: Accepts user defined text as version.

DateVersioningService.name: Date based version
DateVersioningService.description: Uses current date as the version (YYYY-MM-DD).
